purpose: Qwen3-Next BF16 is cached but not feasible on this single 96GB Blackwell node for the preregistered vLLM/Nsight full-matrix gate. This file freezes a feasible cross-family hybrid replacement before any profiler metric rows are collected.
allowed_use: This replacement preserves the full-matrix requirement: three primary Granite rows, three same-shape same-family controls, and three same-shape cross-family falsification rows. It is admissible only because it is committed before profiler execution.
architecture_map_requirement: Boundary indices and directions come from experimental/hybridkernel/phase2/architecture_map.json, generated by build_architecture_map.py from the pinned HuggingFace config copied to experimental/hybridkernel/phase0/configs/nvidia-nemotron-nano-9b-v2.config.json.

replacement_row.feasibility_reason: nvidia/NVIDIA-Nemotron-Nano-9B-v2 is a cross-family Nemotron-H hybrid Mamba/MLP/attention model. It loaded and served a non-evidence local vLLM 0.10.2 preflight on this RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell node at BF16 with CUDA graph capture enabled, using the same server stack intended for profiling.

must_not_do: Do not substitute a pure Transformer or pure SSM model as the cross-family hybrid control.
Do not choose the replacement after seeing Granite primary rows.
Do not promote a Granite-only packet.
Do not change request shape for only the replacement control.
